description_long: This object is a stylized doll head with a dramatic, painted face reminiscent of a theatrical or clown mask. The left half of the head is a smooth, matte gray, while the right half features detailed facial features with blue and black shading, deep-set eyes, pronounced cheekbones, and a frowning mouth with red lips. The top of the head is bald, and a zigzag pattern runs along the centerline, dividing the two halves. The ears are small and rounded, and the overall shape is spherical with a slightly elongated chin. The painted side gives the doll a somber, expressive appearance, while the unpainted side is featureless and neutral.
description: A half-painted doll head with a dramatic, blue-toned face and a smooth, gray unpainted side, divided by a zigzag pattern.
description_view_0: Top view showing the bald head and a prominent zigzag pattern dividing the painted and unpainted halves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, matte gray unpainted surface with minimal facial detail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the expressive, painted face with blue shading, deep-set eyes, and a frowning mouth.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the detailed, painted facial features and the transition to the unpainted half.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object is a head-only doll with no garments or fabric accessories.
attribute_pose: Head only, upright and static, with no visible limbs or torso.
attribute_facial_expression: Frowning expression with downturned mouth, furrowed brows, and deep-set, intense eyes.
attribute_hair_style: Bald head with no visible hair; a zigzag pattern runs along the scalp.
